creator: esk@ira.uka.de
text:
[vkushnir ]
>> Description:
> XMMS does not distinguish on FreeBSD between audio CD and data CD
> containing sound files. As a result it cannot play these files.

>> How-To-Repeat:
> Mount CD with sound files (say, a collection of MP3s). Try to add
> those to XMMS' playlist. Watch "Track1" instead of an output.

I am not able to reproduce these problems (altought I know that I
should).  Anyway, I've committed your changes (with some minor
modifications) to the XMMS cvs.  Thanks.  It would be nice if a
committer could apply the attached patch to the ports tree until a new
version of XMMS is released.

	eSk
